T046.description: End-of-run summary overlay — new module src/ui/RunSummary.ts
details: Triggers: life<=0 (death drain + death effects), cardsPlayed>=30 (new step 10a), rail+25 (victory)
Panel shows: cards played, anam earned, life remaining, biome label (all 4 stats grid)
5 faction bars with color-coded progress bars (druides=green, anciens=amber, korrigans=purple, niamh=teal, ankou=red)
Dark overlay z-index:70, Celtic header 'Fin de Quete', reason message, Rejouer button with hover
Old showEndScreen removed from main.ts; unused imports cleaned (BIOMES, hideCard, crossFade)

T047.description: Card flip CSS animation — 0.4s rotateY on every new card
details: CardOverlay.ts: triggerFlipAnimation() — void offsetWidth reflow trick, class removed after 420ms
